files.purpose: Automates organic customer acquisition, parses traffic high-trust hooks, and auto-generates ad copy based on real-time trends.
Manages landing page state optimization, lead score mapping, and high-conversion assets dynamically.
Handles incoming revenue via PayFast/Ozow for ZAR and Stripe for USD/global card networks.
Executes automated outbound split-payouts, vendor disbursements, and localized banking API settlements.
Parses and ranks contractor profiles, scores incoming skill matrixes, and runs automated script-based interviews.
Compiles local independent contractor agreements, automates NDAs, and registers team roles.
Manages server-side shopping cart state, processes checkouts, generates digital document ZIPs, and tracks local courier/fulfillment webhooks.
Enforces inline South African POPIA data erasure, calculates 15% SARS VAT compliance, and manages global GDPR data sovereignty boundaries.
